patchNotes:
Reminder: Dev plans are always subject to change. Watch your in-game announcements for the most accurate information. 

:Catwoman_Mask: New Event: Feline Fugitive (Available on April 24. Requires War Room Lv. 10)  :Catwoman_Mask:
Hired by the villain Savage to steal a cache of treasures, Catwoman has no intention of letting them fall into his hands. Instead, she deliberately leaves clues behind for Batman to follow. Can he crack the puzzle and recover the hidden treasures?
Use Bat-GPRs to uncover treasures hidden across the map, solve Catwoman's puzzle, and claim generous rewards.
You can also earn Thieves' Market Tokens during the event and exchange them for valuable items in the event store.

:supermanthumbsup: Updates: Superman's Legacy Piece - Solar Recovery Suit  :supermanthumbsup:
The exclusive skill, Kryptonian Shockwave, now has an additional effect: When Superman takes lethal damage for the first time, if at least one ally is still present, he survives with 1 HP instead and immediately consumes all Energy to cast his Ultimate.

🗺️  Updates: World Map 🗺️  :neonsparkles:
You can now zoom out on the world map for a wider view.
A minimap is now available in overview mode, allowing you to quickly reposition by tapping or dragging.

⚔️ Improvements: Guardian Challenge, Great Krypton Rush, Battle for Gotham, and Ultimate Battle for Gotham ⚔️
Adjusted the building occupation scoring system for these events, increasing the Battle Honor gained from occupying various types of buildings.

:BatFamily: Improvements: Battle for Gotham & Ultimate Battle for Gotham :BatFamily: :neonsparkles:
Added a new type of occupiable building: Gotham Plaza.
Reduced the maximum number of defenders allowed in Gotham City Hall and the Gotham Armories.
Improved how healing assistance prompts are displayed.

:Kryptonite: Improvements: Great Krypton Rush :Kryptonite: :neonsparkles:
Added tutorials for safe zones and Bases.
Coordinated Assault mails will now be combined to reduce interruptions.

:PowerUp: Improvements: League Profile Screen :PowerUp:
Added a display showing the perks tied to your league's honor tier for the current week.
Improved the display of league event info, with added Battle for Gotham ranking, League Duel tier, and Guardian Challenge details.
Improved the display of league medals.

🆙  General Improvements 🆙
Squads can now equip vehicles and Kord Chips in Strategic Challenge. :neonsparkles:

🛠️ Fixes 🛠️
Fixed various text and display issues.
